title: Manager, IT Applications
description:
COMPANY DESCRIPTION

Constellar is Asia's preferred partner for convening businesses, curating ideas and creating opportunities for sustainable business growth and global impact. Based in Singapore, we curate and develop influential trade events for key industries and sectors, connecting people, global marketplaces and networks for sustainable growth. We also manage the Singapore EXPO, Singapore's largest purpose-built venue for Meetings, Incentives, Conventions and Exhibitions (MICE).

Our vision is to be a global leader made in Asia, activating impactful networks to enable cross-industry collaboration and innovation through our holistic portfolio of intellectual property (IP) in the MICE industry.

Learn more about us at constellar.co.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Leadership & Team Management

  • Lead, mentor and manage the nearshore engineering team in Batam, fostering a culture of excellence, accountability and continuous growth.
  • Conduct performance reviews, provide constructive feedback, and create individual development plans.
  • Evaluate and enhance development workflows to improve efficiency and quality.

Data Platform Ownership

  • Own and manage the data platform on Azure, including data ingestion, cleansing, transformation, and consumption.
  • Provide guidance on software architecture, design, and technical decision-making.
  • Act as the Data Protection Officer (DPO) to ensure all solutions and processes meet stringent data protection requirements.

Delivery & Project Management

  • Lead solution design and implementation, and contribute directly to development through coding, reviews, and troubleshooting, especially for critical or time-sensitive items.
  • Plan, execute, and oversee software development projects, ensuring alignment with company objectives and deadlines.
  • Define project scope, prioritize tasks, allocate resources, and manage risks.
  • Monitor progress and performance metrics to ensure timely and high-quality delivery.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues as they arise.

Strategic Partnership

  • Partner closely with business stakeholders to understand real needs, simplify processes, and drive innovation using modern technology and automation.
  • Stay updated on emerging technologies and recommend their adoption when beneficial.
QUALIFICATIONS
  • Bachelor's degree in information technology, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
  • Minimum 5 years of software development experience, with at least 2 years in managing a team.
  • Proficiency in relevant programming languages (e.g., Python, Java, Power Automate) and frameworks.
  • Strong understanding of software development methodologies, such as Microsoft Azure, WordPress, Node.js, and AI tools (Copilot, Power Automate).
  • Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
  • Experience managing cross-functional teams and collaborating across departments.
  • Passion for technology and a commitment to fostering a collaborative and inclusive workplace.
  • Problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
  • Strong communication and leadership abilities.
  • Willingness and ability to travel from time to time to engage with our nearshore team in Batam.
Please note that your application will be sent to and reviewed by the direct employer - Constellar Group Pte Ltd

postedCompany.name: HYPERSCAL SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.

hiringCompany.description:
Founded in 2021, Constellar Holdings manages a holistic portfolio of digital-enabled IPs that connects a global eco-system of partners for the Meetings, Incentives, Conventions and Exhibitions (MICE) industry.

With an extensive global footprint and over five decades of experience curating innovative event and venue experiences for businesses and consumers, Constellar offers customisable digital and hybrid event and event space solutions that help expand global business networks and enable cross-industry collaboration.

Constellar aims to be a MICE industry champion of growth activating impactful networks for sustainable growth, setting the highest standards of engagements worldwide.
hiringCompany.name: CONSTELLAR GROUP PTE. LTD.
